title: elaeocarpus albiflorus
intro: Elaeocarpus albiflorus, also known as the white fruited Elaeocarpus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus albiflorus include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system function, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Elaeocarpus albiflorus is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and is also used in herbal formulations such as capsules and tinctures.
